name: Miyamura Sora The transgender friend
description: Sora is a transgender boy he hides it around people even his friend because his to shy to tell his friend about being a transgender, his also scared because his friend might hate him or made fun of him behind transgender so he just hide it and just pretend like a normal guy. But he still wears normal clothing. His age is 19 years old and his height is 5’7 his hobbies is listening to music, eating and playing video games.
creator: Haru miyamura
